bio.label: About me
bio.heading: Code runs in my veins.
bio.text1: I'm a passionate frontend developer with 10+ years of experience building modern web applications. I've worked as a Senior Front End Developer at companies like NICE and Playvox, crafting exceptional user experiences at scale.
bio.text2: I specialize in Vue, React, Next.js and TypeScript. Beyond web, I build mobile apps with React Native — including my own indie studio myappcube, with two social games live on iOS and Android.
bio.openToWorkSub: Available for new projects and collaborations.

nice.desc: Building enterprise-grade web applications for one of the world's leading customer experience companies. Crafting scalable UI systems used by thousands of agents globally.

playvox.desc: Developed the core frontend of a workforce management platform for contact centers. Worked with Vue 3, TypeScript and large-scale data visualization.

cta.heading: Let's build something great.
cta.sub: Open to new opportunities, freelance projects and collaborations.

adventures.pageDescription: Adventures, travel and unique experiences around the world by Daho.
adventures.description: Adventures, travel and unique experiences around the world.
adventures.storyP1: From a young age, I always knew I wanted to see the world with my own eyes. Not in photos or documentaries — but by standing on the ground, breathing the air and talking to people. Every trip has taught me something no book or screen could: that the world is vast, diverse, and surprisingly generous when you open yourself up to it.
adventures.storyP2: Daho Adventures was born from that need to share what I see. Not the typical tourist guides — but the hidden corners that don't make it onto lists, the conversations that shift your perspective, and the moments that only happen when you stop over-planning. Photography, video, stories — all to bring you along on the journey.
adventures.storyP3: Today I create travel content on Instagram and other platforms, documenting destinations across Mexico, Latin America, and beyond. If you feel the world calling and don't know where to start — welcome. This community is for those who aren't afraid to explore.
adventures.tagline: Exploring the world, one destination at a time.
adventures.taglineDesc: Travels, adventures and unique experiences that leave a mark. Follow along and see the world from a different angle.

coexist.pageDescription: We coexist by respecting diversity. Inspiration, awareness and human connection. Phrases, reflections and content by Daho.
coexist.description: We coexist by respecting diversity. Inspiration, awareness and human connection.
coexist.storyP1: Coexist was born from a simple question: why is it so hard for us to get along with people who think differently? In a world where social media amplifies divisions, I felt someone had to speak about respect, empathy, and coexistence — without sermons, without taking sides. Just people trying to understand each other.
coexist.storyP2: Daho Coexist is that space. Through quotes, reflections, and content on Instagram, I try to put words to things we all feel but rarely say. It's not activism, it's not politics — it's the philosophy of live and let live, of listening before judging, of finding the humanity in each person.
coexist.storyP3: The community that has formed here surprises me every day. People from different countries, beliefs and ways of seeing life, united by the simple desire to coexist better. If you believe the world can be kinder — you belong here.
coexist.taglineDesc: A space where diversity is celebrated, empathy connects and every voice matters. Join the community.

give.pageDescription: Simple gestures. Real help. Humanity unfiltered. Let helping others become the norm.
give.description: Simple gestures. Real help. Humanity unfiltered.
give.storyHeading: Giving transforms lives — starting with yours.
give.storyP1: Daho Give started with a conviction: that helping doesn't have to be complicated. You don't need a foundation or large resources — sometimes a simple gesture, an honest conversation, or sharing what you have is enough. The act of giving, no matter the size, changes both the receiver and the giver.
give.storyP2: What I share here are real moments: everyday gestures that show that solidarity exists and that it works. Anonymous donations, helping strangers, communities supporting each other — stories that get little attention but make a big difference. I want every piece of content to inspire you to act, not just keep scrolling.
give.storyP3: The movement is simple: make helping trendy. Make it cool to share, give, support. Let younger generations see generosity as a strength, not a weakness. If that idea resonates with you — you're already part of Daho Give.
give.tagline: Let helping others become the norm.
give.taglineDesc: Small gestures that transform lives. Join the movement of giving without expecting anything in return.

gamer.pageDescription: Gaming, live streams and video game content across multiple platforms by Daho.
gamer.description: From competitive shooters to narrative RPGs — gameplay, reviews, live streams and community across YouTube, Twitch, TikTok and Instagram. Real content from a lifelong gamer, built for people who actually care about games.
gamer.taglineDesc: Gameplay, reviews and live streams across multiple platforms. Join the gaming community.
gamer.ytDesc: Deep-dive gameplays, honest reviews, and curated top lists from a gamer who has been playing since childhood. Every video is crafted for quality — no filler, just content worth watching. Subscribe and never miss a new upload.
gamer.twitchDesc: Live streams multiple times per week — from first-time playthroughs to competitive matches. The Twitch chat is the place to hang out in real time, react together, and turn random gaming sessions into something memorable. Follow to get notified when I go live.
gamer.tiktokDesc: The best highlights from streams and gameplays, distilled into short high-energy clips. Funny moments, clutch plays, and unexpected outcomes — all under 60 seconds. Follow and you will never miss the moments that matter most.
gamer.storyP1: Gaming has been a constant in my life since I picked up my first controller as a kid. From Mario on the family TV to late nights in competitive lobbies — video games shaped how I think, how I problem-solve, and how I connect with people around the world.
gamer.storyP2: Daho Gaming started as a way to share that passion. Not just to show off gameplay, but to build a space where gamers can talk honestly about the games we love, the ones that disappoint us, and everything in between. Reviews, streams, clips — everything I make is something I would want to watch myself.
gamer.storyP3: Today I create content across YouTube, Twitch, TikTok and Instagram with a community that keeps growing. Whether you are here for the streams, the clips, or the reviews — welcome. The controller is always warm.

privacy.pageDescription: Privacy policy for dahoofficial.com. Information about data usage, cookies and advertising.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At dahoofficial.com we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information may be collected when you visit this site, how it is used, and what choices you have. By using this site you acknowledge this policy.
privacy.s1Body: We do not collect personal data directly through forms or accounts. When you browse this site, technical and usage data may be collected automatically by third-party services including Google Analytics and Google AdSense. This data may include your IP address, browser type and version, operating system, pages visited, time spent on each page, referral source, and approximate geographic location. None of this data is linked to your personal identity.
privacy.s2Body: This site uses both first-party and third-party cookies. First-party cookies help remember your language preference and improve your browsing experience across visits. Third-party cookies are placed by services like Google Analytics and Google AdSense to measure traffic and serve relevant ads. Cookies are small text files stored on your device — they contain no executable code and cannot access other files on your computer. You can view, manage, or delete cookies at any time in your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some site functionality such as language persistence.
privacy.s3Body: We participate in Google AdSense, a service provided by Google LLC, which displays advertising on this website. Google AdSense uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other sites across the web. Interest-based advertising allows Google to show ads that are more relevant to your browsing interests. You can opt out of personalized advertising at g.co/adsense/privacypartner or through the Network Advertising Initiative opt-out page. By using this site you acknowledge that ads may appear and that Google's own privacy policy applies to data collected through AdSense.
privacy.s4Body: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with this site. The data collected includes session duration, pages per visit, traffic sources, device type, and approximate geographic region. This information is aggregated and anonymized — it does not personally identify you. We have enabled IP anonymization so your full IP address is never stored by Google Analytics. Data is retained for 14 months and then automatically deleted. You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the browser add-on available at tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.
privacy.s5Body: This site integrates content from third-party platforms including YouTube (Google LLC), Twitch (Amazon.com Inc.), Instagram (Meta Platforms Inc.), TikTok (ByteDance Ltd.) and Facebook (Meta Platforms Inc.). When you interact with embedded content or social widgets from these platforms, they may independently set cookies and collect usage data subject to their own privacy policies. We are not responsible for the data practices of these external services. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of each platform before engaging with their content on this site.
privacy.s6Body: Depending on your country of residence you may have rights regarding personal data, including the right to access, correct, or request deletion of data held about you, and the right to object to certain types of processing. Since we do not directly collect personal data, most requests should be directed to the third-party services listed above. For any privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, contact us by email and we will respond as promptly as possible.
privacy.s7Body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, write to us at:

terms.pageDescription: Terms and conditions of use for dahoofficial.com.
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using dahoofficial.com you agree to the following terms and conditions. These terms apply to all content, features, and services available on this site. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please discontinue your use of this site.
terms.s1Body: This site is intended for personal, informational, and entertainment purposes. You may read, share links to, and reference content for non-commercial purposes provided that proper credit is given to dahoofficial.com and the author. Reproducing full articles, posts, or other content without express written authorization is prohibited. Systematic scraping or downloading of content for redistribution — whether manual or automated — is not permitted.
terms.s2Body: All original content on this site — including written articles, blog posts, design elements, code, photography, and branding — is the intellectual property of Diego Hernández (Daho) unless explicitly stated otherwise. All rights reserved. The Daho, Daho Gaming, Daho Developer, and Daho Coexist brand identities and logos are proprietary marks. Third-party trademarks, logos, and content remain the property of their respective owners.
terms.s3Body: This site may link to or embed content from third-party websites and platforms including YouTube, Twitch, Instagram, TikTok, and others. These links are provided for convenience and informational purposes only. We do not control and are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of any third-party site. Visiting external links is at your own discretion and risk. We recommend reviewing the terms and privacy policy of any site you navigate to from this one.
terms.s4Body: This site displays advertisements through Google AdSense. Ads are managed and served by Google LLC and may be personalized based on your browsing history and interests. We do not control the content of individual advertisements and are not responsible for advertiser claims. We do not endorse products or services advertised unless explicitly stated. For information on how Google uses data from advertising, visit google.com/policies/privacy/partners.
terms.s5Body: All content on this site is provided on an as-is and as-available basis without warranties of any kind, express or implied. While we make every effort to ensure accuracy, we do not guarantee that information is complete, current, or error-free. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this site or from any errors or omissions in its content. Use of any information obtained through this site is entirely at your own risk.
terms.s6Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time without prior notice. Updated terms will be posted on this page with a revised effective date. Your continued use of the site following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms. We encourage you to review this page periodically to stay informed of any modifications.
terms.s7Body: For any queries about these terms, contact us at:
